title: HOMELESS SERVICES - 211info
text: CATHOLIC CHARITIES HOMELESS SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides drop-in services including information and referral, showers, laundry facilities, a community meal, snacks, and coffee. Offers access to a phone, community voicemail, mailing address, and computers. 2740 SE Powell Boulevard #5 Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Non-parenting women age 25 and older who are experiencing homelessness. Well-mannered pets are allowed. Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-1pm Lunch: 11:30am-1pm Email (971) 222-1880 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 222-1880 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: City of Portland TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on TriMet bus line 9 Powell Boulevard Services: Community Meals * Homeless Women Community Voicemail * Homeless Women Homeless Drop In Centers * Women Laundry Facilities * Homeless Women Public Internet Access Sites * Homeless Women Public Showers/Baths * Homeless Women Specialized Information and Referral * Homeless Women Temporary Mailing Address * Homeless Women Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING TRANSITIONS PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - REFUGEE SERVICES LEGAL SERVICES - IMMIGRATION LEGAL SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CATHOLIC CHARITIES
